steps.title: Identify the starting value
steps.content: At birth, $x=0$ and the seal pup's length was $122$ centimeters. That means the constant term is $122$.

steps.title: Use the monthly growth
steps.content:
The length increased by $3.8$ centimeters per month, so the coefficient of $x$ is $3.8$. The model is
$$y=3.8x+122$$
The answer is D.
